reviews.text: Very good services and advices.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Kw C,

Thank you for taking your precious time to share your experience here. Your kind rating certainly would motivate all of us to improve continuously and serve our beloved residents better.

Thank you.

reviews.text:
My mother has been staying in Econ for 2.4 years and she went in post-spinal cord surgery. From the moment my mom arrived, I felt reassured that she was in safe and capable hands.

The post-operative care was truly outstanding. The team monitored the recovery closely, managed the medications with great attention to detail, and ensured her wounds were cared for properly at every stage. They were always attentive to any discomfort or concerns, responding quickly and professionally, which made a significant difference to her healing process.

What truly sets this place apart is that it is run by nurses. Their clinical expertise is evident in every aspect of care they also have in-house Doctors who will be in Econ twice a week, allowing easy access to medical advise if needed.

I am incredibly grateful for the care my mother received and would wholeheartedly recommend this nursing home to anyone, especially those  in need of high-quality, compassionate post-surgical support.

reviews.text:
Our father was admitted to Econ Healthcare in mid-2024 when his health suddenly deteriorated. He was in his mid-80s at the time. On several occasions, emergency admissions to the general hospital were required, and the team at Econ handled all the necessary arrangements efficiently on our behalf.

Over the next 1.5 years, our father’s condition gradually stabilized. The nursing staff and caregivers consistently demonstrated immense dedication, professionalism, and compassion in caring for him. Even the general workers who maintained the cleanliness of the environment were friendly, approachable, and always ready to help when needed.

We were promptly informed whenever medical attention was required, and with our consent, the team would proceed to make the necessary arrangements. This gave us great reassurance and peace of mind.

The facilities and living environment are well-maintained and clinically clean, providing a pleasant and comfortable setting for patients to rehabilitate and rest.

We are truly grateful to the team at Econ Healthcare, as well as the management for putting in place an efficient management system that ensures patients’ welfare is well looked after and that staff are properly trained to carry out their duties professionally.

Thank you to the management and staff at all levels for your excellent service and dedication to your residents and their families.

reviews.text:
超级烂的地方 那边看护很烂！！！
老人家半夜说胃疼要吃药 她大声骂她叫她睡觉 ！！！！还摔东西！！
还不懂乱拆开病人身上的东西！害病人大半夜赶回去医院！！她们全程什么都没有陪同！
而且服务铃叫看护有时候按了大半小时才会来！
人家才手术出来不久 选择你们就是为了安心！而你们却如此对待！！
还什么都要收费！最好问清楚！
帮你泡一次奶粉都必须收费的那种
真的很差的一家看护中心！！！
This place is absolutely terrible! The care there is awful!!!

An elderly person complained of stomach pain and needed medication in the middle of the night, and the caregiver yelled at them, telling them to go to sleep!!! They even threw things!!!

They didn't know how to properly remove the patient's belongings! Forcing the patient to rush back to the hospital in the middle of the night!! They didn't accompany the patient at all!

And sometimes it takes half an hour after pressing the call button to summon a caregiver!

This person had just undergone surgery and chose your place for peace of mind! And this is how you treat them!!

They charge for everything! You'd better ask beforehand!

They even charge for making formula!

This is a truly awful care center!!!

Greetings, Jether Tan

Your review is very concerning to us. Would you mind to contact us so that we can understand further on the experience that you have encountered?

We hope you could come forward to us and share your real experience as we genuinely want to ensure the residents are well taken care of.

Kindly reach us or our Person in Charge anytime at tp@econhealthcare.com or call / WhatsApp us at 012 642 6046.

Looking forward to hear from you soon.

Thank you.

reviews.text: 因为车祸的关系。在伤及脊椎及下肢无力的情况下入住疗养院。不能自理每日又要清洗后背伤口及其他缝针处的伤口。日子真的苦不堪言，幸好还有一班尽责的医疗人员妥善的照顾我生活上一切大大小小的事情，还有谢谢那位下针如行云流水帅帅的针灸师。更要谢谢Elvina Bibiana物理治疗师，在我康复的路上。给了我不少助力。经过一个多月的努力，我终于出院了。虽然还不能正常走路。但只要继续复建，我相信我行的。
reviews.textTranslated: Due to a car accident, I was admitted to a nursing home with spinal injuries and lower limb weakness. Unable to care for myself, I had to clean my back wounds and other stitches daily. Life was incredibly difficult. Fortunately, a team of dedicated medical staff took excellent care of all my needs, big and small. I also want to thank the handsome acupuncturist whose needles moved with practiced ease. A special thank you to physical therapist Elvina Bibiana, who provided invaluable support throughout my recovery. After more than a month of effort, I was finally discharged. Although I can't walk normally yet, I believe I can do it if I continue rehabilitation.

reviews.text:
I m a stroke patient currently staying at Econ Perling 1st floor F4.

Most of nurses here are Indian with some Malay nurses.and I would said they really kind and helpful. I was admitted on 22/9/25 and I still remember the night when my Urine was infected by bacteria. The Indian nurse named Sorna is the one who took care of me. She asked me to drink more water to get rid of the pain She really came to my bed every 1/2 hr to check and gave me water to drink . With her help my urine has back to normal and I really appreciate such a helpful, caring and friendly nurse. Most of the nurses here speaks Malay also I won’t forget the cute Malay nurse who put the urine tube for me. She never forget to give me medicine before and after supper.

Econ do provide physio course for patient with payment of course! Thanks for my instructor Nadia and Ms Ooi from Masha University .They are really professional and good. With their help, I hope to recover fast too.

Big thanks to the manager Alvin ( an understandable person who always listen to our voice) and also Alson ( fr KL)

Econ is a good place to stay. The enviroment  and location are good too. Once again, thanks to all staffs who served me here  ilike Malkit, Lachumy, Kamisah and other Malay, Philippine nurses and also the downstair guards who always helped us to on the air cond when we are at the ground floor visiting  area.

From: Mdm Chong Ley Hong

reviews.text:
Put my father in Econ nursing home for after care I loved the environment the moment I stepped in. Mr Yao is very gentle, kind and accommodating.

The whole nursing home is generally clean.
There are 24 hours nurses supervision and updating system. The nurses are generally helpful. Would like to give a big shout out for nurse Linda who takes care of Lily ward at different shifts.
She is HIGHLY competent!! she can do a 2 person job by herself and do it better. Stellar!

The best nursing home in Johor that's all I can say, highly recommended.  Well done to the team.

reviews.text: Not recommended, too disappointed. Mum was transferred to Hospital for urgent treatment and have been 1 weeks plus not go back to ECON centre but the contract of stay is still on-going at that time. When we go back to this centre to collect mum's belonging before the end of the nursing contract, Mum's bed have someone else lay on it and mum's things were removed to one corner without getting our permission. Actually during the nursing period, they report the daily task but in actual not everytime they perform the task but they report they have done it.  Super bad experiance, those who is surveying the nursing centre, please be careful of selecting them.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Lee Pey Shya,

Thank you for your feedback.

As per stipulated in our admission contract, our home fee will still be running during period of hospitalization / home leave. On the other hand, the bed that we arranged for your late mother is actually of higher rate as compared to the fee collected due to bed vacancy when she checked in. Such arrangement is communicated to your relative and he has acknowledged.  

On the 28th Mar'25, upon confirmation that your late mother has discharged from hospital, returned home and on palliative care, we transferred late mother's belongings while reserving another bed for your late mother. Subsequently, we put a stop on the home fee before our 10 days discharge notice, when we regret to receive the news of your late mother's passing.  

Pertaining your feedback of discrepancies in reporting, we will put in record the findings where it could be inspected by Ministry of Health during our 2 yearly license renewal. Hence, this feedback came very shocking to us.

We hope you could come forward to us and share your real experience as we genuinely want to ensure the residents are well taken care of.

Kindly reach us anytime at tp@econhealthcare.com or call / WhatsApp us at 012 642 6046.

Looking forward to hear from you soon.

Thank you.

reviews.text: My mum has sacral sore and wound at forearm after medical problem that cause her to bed bound. ECON has a good , professional, excellent, and friendly  team of nurses and physiotherapists who provide home medical treatment just a call away. My mother's  wound now is healed, and she is able to ambulate freely now at home. Thanks, ECON, for the remarkable professional service. Keep up the good job.

reviews.text: My grandmother resided at ECON Medicare Centre and Nursing Home, and I am incredibly grateful for the exceptional care she received for the past 33 months . From the moment we stepped inside, we were impressed by the warm and welcoming environment. The staffs demonstrated professionalism, compassion, and expertise, ensuring my grandmother’s well-being. The facility itself is impeccably maintained, with cozy common areas and beautiful gardens. However, what truly stood out was Mr. Alvin, the person-in-charge. His good personality, hospitality, and unwavering responsibility make a significant impact. I highly recommend ECON Medicare Centre to anyone seeking outstanding care. My heartfelt thanks to Mr. Alvin and the entire staffs for their dedication, they truly make a difference in people’s lives. 🌟🏥 Highly recommended.....

There are many things in the center that need to be greatly improved, including the nursing staff. The fees are not cheap, but the actual situation is not very satisfactory.

The nurses there are very cheerful and efficient. I am grateful for the good care she received.

reviews.text:
We've searched for a few nursing homes after my godfather was weakened for a few weeks and his muscles had atrophied. Amongst the few we had seen in the area, Econ has been the cleanest and the most professional. They had certified physiotherapists which was exactly what we were looking for.

The staff were attentive and caring, the food was balanced for the elderly and they had biweekly doctor visits for those that required it. Environment was clean and spacious which was a conducive environment for the elderly to recover.

Highly recommended if you're in search of a nursing/recovering facility. Definitely the best in comparison to the other options available in JB.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Mr Evan,

Thank you for taking your precious time to share your experience here. Your kind words certainly would motivate all of us to improve continuously and serve our beloved residents better.

It is our pleasure to be able to care for your godfather. We thank you too for giving us this opportunity to serve him.

Thank you.
